attacking_style: Not an attacker. Functions as a leadout specialist delivering sprinters into final positioning in chaotic finales, typically releasing in final 200-300 meters.
team_tactics: Serves as final leadout man for UAE sprinters, navigating through late chaos to pilot teammates into contention. Provides clear organizational vision when finales become disorganized.
terrain_preference: Flat sprint finales where technical positioning and navigation through traffic matter more than pure power. Thrives in chaotic, congested sprint approaches.
vulnerability: Limited data, but role indicates struggles on selective terrain requiring personal results. Depends on team sprinter's finishing ability for success measurement.
key_patterns: Functions as leadout specialist rather than personal finisher for UAE team.
Navigates chaotic sprint finales with superior organizational vision and positioning instincts.
Successfully delivers sprinters through barrier gaps and narrow passing routes in congested finishes.
form_trajectory: unknown: Single observation shows effective execution of domestique duties but insufficient data for form assessment
built_from: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 2
